tools.name: list_codebases
tools.description: List all indexed codebases with status and file counts

tools.name: list_spaces
tools.description: List available spaces (configured project roots) for indexing codebases. Use this to find space names before calling index_codebase.

tools.name: index_codebase
tools.description: Index a new codebase for semantic search. Provide either "source" (absolute path) OR "space" (configured space name).

source.description: Absolute path to source directory (alternative to space)

space.description: Space name from config (e.g., "COOLKID-Work") - resolves project path automatically

project.description: Project folder name within space (defaults to codebase name if not specified)

analyze.description: Run LLM analysis after indexing to generate project description (default: false)

tools.name: search_codebase
tools.description: Primary search tool for single codebase. RECOMMENDED over grep_codebase for most searches. Combines semantic (meaning) + keyword (exact) matching. Use strategy:keyword for fast name lookups, strategy:semantic for concept queries. Use analyze:true to get AI-summarized results (saves 50-90% tokens). Codebase name supports partial matching.

strategy.description: hybrid=best overall, keyword=fast exact match, semantic=conceptual similarity

analyze.description: Use local LLM to analyze results and return structured summary with keyFindings, relevantFiles, implementationPatterns. Saves 50-90% tokens vs raw results. Recommended for exploration.

includeRaw.description: Include raw search results in addition to analysis. Use when you want both the AI summary AND original snippets for drilling down.

tools.name: search_semantic
tools.description: Semantic (AI embedding) search - finds conceptually similar code. Best for: "how is X implemented?", "find code that does Y", pattern discovery. Slower than keyword but understands meaning, not just text. Use analyze:true for structured summary. Codebase name supports partial matching.

query.description: Natural language query describing what you are looking for

analyze.description: Use local LLM to analyze results and return structured summary with keyFindings, relevantFiles, implementationPatterns. Saves 50-90% tokens vs raw results. Recommended for exploration.

includeRaw.description: Include raw search results in addition to analysis. Use when you want both the AI summary AND original snippets for drilling down.

tools.name: search_keyword
tools.description: FAST indexed keyword search. Best for: exact function names, class names, variable names, imports. Searches file paths AND content. Much faster than grep_codebase (<100ms vs 1-3s). Use this INSTEAD of grep_codebase when searching for specific identifiers. Use analyze:true for AI summary. Codebase name supports partial matching.

query.description: Keywords to search (function names, class names, etc.)

searchContent.description: Search file content (not just paths). Slightly slower but more thorough.

analyze.description: Use local LLM to analyze results and return structured summary (reduces token cost for calling LLM)

includeRaw.description: Include raw search results in addition to analysis (increases token usage)

tools.name: grep_codebase
tools.description: Live regex search using ripgrep. ALWAYS CURRENT (searches filesystem directly). Use ONLY when: (1) You need regex patterns like "function.*predict\(", (2) You need exact line numbers for editing, (3) You suspect index is stale. OTHERWISE prefer search_keyword (faster for names) or search_semantic (for concepts). Slower than indexed search (1-3s vs <200ms). Use analyze:true to get structured analysis. Codebase name supports partial matching.

regex.description: Use regex pattern matching. Set to false for literal string search (faster)

maxMatchesPerFile.description: Max matches per file (-1 for unlimited, 1 for "find files only")

noCache.description: Skip cache and force fresh search

analyze.description: Use local LLM to analyze results and return structured summary with keyFindings, relevantFiles, implementationPatterns. Saves 50-90% tokens vs raw results.

includeRaw.description: Include raw search results in addition to analysis. Use when you want both the AI summary AND original snippets for drilling down.

tools.name: search_all_codebases
tools.description: [RECOMMENDED] Search across ALL indexed codebases at once. Perfect for finding "how is X implemented across different projects?" Strategies: hybrid (default, best overall), semantic (conceptual), keyword (fast exact match). AVOID strategy:grep unless you need regex - it is 10x slower. Use analyze:true (strongly recommended) to get AI-summarized insights instead of 50+ raw snippets (saves 50-90% tokens).

query.description: Search query (natural language, keywords, or grep pattern)

strategy.description: hybrid=best overall (default), keyword=fastest, semantic=conceptual, grep=slow regex (avoid unless needed)

limit.description: Total result limit across all codebases

concurrency.description: Number of codebases to search in parallel

analyze.description: Use local LLM to analyze results and return structured summary with keyFindings, relevantFiles, implementationPatterns. Saves 50-90% tokens vs raw results. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED for cross-codebase exploration.

includeRaw.description: Include raw search results in addition to analysis. Use when you want both the AI summary AND original snippets for drilling down.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Get file structure (functions, classes, imports) without content. Codebase name supports partial matching.

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Get file content with staleness check. Codebase name supports partial matching.

analyze.description: Re-run LLM analysis if stale (default: false)

tools.name: remove_codebase
tools.description: Remove a codebase and all its data

tools.name: check_codebase_status
tools.description: Check staleness status of a codebase (stale files, missing files). Codebase name supports partial matching.

tools.name: check_file_stale
tools.description: Check if a specific file is stale (changed since indexing). Codebase name supports partial matching.

path.description: File path relative to codebase root

tools.name: run_maintenance
tools.description: Manually trigger maintenance cycle to refresh stale codebases

codebase.description: Specific codebase to refresh, or omit for all

tools.name: analyze_codebase
tools.description: Run LLM analysis to generate project description and identify key files. Codebase name supports partial matching.

name.description: Codebase name to analyze (partial match supported)

tools.name: get_codebase_description
tools.description: Get LLM-generated project description with staleness check. Codebase name supports partial matching.

tools.name: get_prioritized_files
tools.description: Get files ordered by importance (high/medium/low priority). Codebase name supports partial matching.
